caribbean.headline: Heavy Rain and Moderate Winds Impact Grand Cayman Today
caribbean.paragraph: Grand Cayman is experiencing sustained winds up to 18 kt with wave heights reaching 6.2 ft and a dominant southeast swell period of 7 seconds. Rain probability is 100%, creating wet conditions throughout the day while Cozumel sees lighter winds near 14 kt and less intense marine activity.

mediterranean.headline: Heavy Rain and Moderate Winds Impact Venice Today
mediterranean.paragraph: Venice is experiencing moderate southeast winds at 13 kt with wave heights reaching 2.7 ft and a swell period of 5 seconds. Rain probability is 62%, indicating a significant chance of showers affecting the area, while Mykonos sees stronger winds up to 23 kt but less impactful weather overall.
